changelog: Feature: Dashboard CPU, memory, and network bandwidth gauges
Feature: Cancel button for running backup jobs in Activities
Enhancement: Backup paths tab — 'Server-managed paths' toggle to control allow_config_paths from the UI
Enhancement: Inline backup start feedback on client detail page
Fix: no_backup_paths now correctly populated from UrBackup live status API
Fix: allow_config_paths control moved from Permissions tab to Backup Paths tab
Fix: Warning banner shows actionable fix instead of client-only instructions
Fix: Dashboard network gauge uses actual link capacity
